overview.minides: The plusher seat in the Range Rover line — semi-aniline leather, Executive Class rear seating with Hot Stone massage, and a 1,600W Meridian Signature sound system.
overview.description: The Range Rover Autobiography sits above HSE and below SV in the fifth-generation Range Rover (L460) hierarchy. Available across diesel (D350 mild-hybrid 3.0L straight-six), turbo-petrol (P400 mild-hybrid 3.0L straight-six), and BMW-sourced V8 petrol (P530 4.4L twin-turbo) powertrains, all paired with an 8-speed ZF automatic and full-time AWD. The Autobiography trim adds semi-aniline leather upholstery, 22-way Executive Class rear seats with Hot Stone heated massage (LWB), a 13.1-inch curved Pivi Pro touchscreen, a 13.7-inch digital driver display, a 1,600W 35-speaker Meridian Signature Sound System, four-zone climate control, and All Wheel Steering that lets the 5.2-metre LWB turn inside an 11.54-metre circle. The LWB variant offers 4, 5, or 7-seat configurations.

suspension.front: SLA Double Wishbone with Virtual Swivel Axis, Electronic Air Suspension with Dynamic Response
suspension.rear: 5-Link Axle, Electronic Air Suspension with Dynamic Response
suspension.additionalTech: All Wheel Steering (up to 7.3° rear angle); Dynamic Response Pro active roll control; ride height adjustment
